name: unraid-modernui
description: Clean, flat, responsive theme for Unraid 7.x. v0.5.4: install/uninstall integrity fixes. The SHA backup pointer no longer captures our own injected/overlaid output as the "stock" backup, and the destructive event/started + event/stopped hooks (which strip chrome on array stop and re-corrupt the backup pointer on array start) are removed.

scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:php
